backtest.name: Cross-Sectional Low-Residual-Volatility Equity
backtest.hypothesis: Low residual-risk stocks may offer better risk-adjusted returns than high residual-risk stocks.
backtest.signal_summary: Long low residual volatility and short high residual volatility after market-beta estimation
backtest.failure_modes: Can become a disguised low-beta trade and suffer sharp risk-on reversals

action.interpretation: Backtest complete but excluded from Combined Portfolio because net Sharpe is not positive after costs.

logic.economic_hypothesis: Low residual-risk stocks may offer better risk-adjusted returns than high residual-risk stocks.
logic.expected_return_driver: Low-risk anomaly and avoidance of high-idiosyncratic-volatility securities
logic.signal_inputs: daily adjusted close, market return proxy, trailing liquidity
logic.score_direction: Higher score -> long; lower score -> short after cross-sectional ranking.
logic.long_leg: Top 20% ranked names by signal score.
logic.short_leg: Bottom 20% ranked names by signal score.
logic.transaction_cost_assumption: 5 bps buy / 5 bps sell applied to turnover.
logic.likely_failure_regime: Can become a disguised low-beta trade and suffer sharp risk-on reversals

limitations: Pilot 500 / current-listed survivorship-biased universe.
Incomplete point-in-time universe; no full historical membership reconstruction.
No complete borrow-cost model or market-impact model in the baseline.
No formal factor neutralization in the current factory baseline.
No full walk-forward validation in the current baseline artifacts.
yfinance OHLCV limitations and hypothetical backfill where noted in summary.json.
Historical research evidence is not live performance or shadow PnL.
Missing execution returns are tracked separately and can invalidate a run when exposure thresholds are breached.
Survivorship flag: True.
factory_research.decision_reason: Reference only — excluded from Combined Portfolio composite.

factor_interpretation.label: Low-volatility / defensive exposure
factor_interpretation.detail: Long low residual volatility and short high residual volatility after beta estimation.

factor_interpretation.label: Market beta
factor_interpretation.detail: Beta-neutral construction is intended, but residual low-vol can still behave defensively in stress.

backtest.name: Cross-Sectional Liquidity Resilience
backtest.hypothesis: Stocks with lower price impact during market and volume stress may exhibit a resilience premium.

action.interpretation: Retained research-composite member with positive cost-adjusted baseline; not allocation approved.
